subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of the worlds, Who hath, through the effulgent rays of His Most Great Name, illumined the world and its peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مولی العالم را لایق و سزاست که بانوار اسم اعظم ابهی عالم و امم را بنور
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for forgiveness, @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
